lede: A look at September 28 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Isack Hadjar and Andrés Guardado, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: 2023 Rotterdam shootings
events.desc: The 2023 Rotterdam shootings occurred, during which two people were killed in a shooting and arson incident at a residence in Delfshaven, Rotterdam. Additionally, one person lost their life in a classroom at the Erasmus University Medical Center.

events.title: 2009 Guinean protests
events.desc: The military junta leading Guinea attacks a protest rally, killing or wounding 1,400 people.

events.title: Typhoon Xangsane
events.desc: Typhoon Xangsane passes over Manila after impacting parts of Southern Luzon and Eastern Visayas, becoming the strongest to affect the Philippine capital in 11 years.

events.title: Siege of Warsaw (1939)
events.desc: World War II: The siege of Warsaw comes to an end.

events.title: Alexander Fleming
events.desc: Alexander Fleming notices a bacteria-killing mold growing in his laboratory, discovering what later became known as penicillin.

events.title: Philippine–American War
events.desc: Philippine–American War: Filipino guerrillas kill more than forty American soldiers while losing 28 of their own.

events.title: Declaration of Independence (Mexico)
events.desc: The Declaration of Independence of the Mexican Empire is drafted. It will be made public on 13 October.

events.title: William the Conqueror
events.desc: William the Conqueror lands in England, beginning the Norman conquest.

events.title: Pope Pontian
events.desc: Pope Pontian resigns. He is exiled to the mines of Sardinia, along with Hippolytus of Rome.

events.title: Pompey
events.desc: Pompey disembarks at Pelusium upon arriving in Egypt, whereupon he is assassinated by order of King Ptolemy XIII.

births.name: Pierre Clémenti
births.line: French actor, director, producer, and screenwriter (died 1999)

deaths.text: Winfield Dunn, American politician, 43rd Governor of Tennessee
John Marks Moore, American politician and attorney
